components.name: cyclonedx-dotnet
components.description: Auto-generates NuGet dependency SBOM per service

components.name: manual-curation
components.description: AI components, external services, and data flows manually curated for AI-BOM overlay

component.name: Biotrackr
component.description: Personal health and fitness tracking platform with AI-powered conversational agent and reporting

components.name: Claude Sonnet 4.6
components.description: Primary LLM for Biotrackr Chat API. Powers conversational health data queries via Microsoft Agent Framework. Processes user prompts containing health context and returns natural-language analysis.

approach.description: Pretrained on large diverse datasets with reinforcement learning from AI feedback (RLAIF) and Constitutional AI character trait training

technicalLimitations: 1M token context window. 64k max output tokens (300k on Batch API). API rate limits apply. Provider-managed versioning — model behavior may change without notice.
Knowledge cutoff: May 2025 (reliable), January 2026 (training data). Information after these dates may be absent or inaccurate.
Over-eagerness behavior observed in alignment evaluations — model may take creative actions not explicitly requested. Mitigated via system prompt constraints.
ethicalConsiderations: Processes personal health data (PHI) including activity, sleep, nutrition, and weight records. Prompt injection mitigations (ASI01) and tool policy limits are in place.
Deployed under Anthropic's ASL-3 Standard with enhanced security and deployment safeguards.
users: Biotrackr users querying personal health data via conversational AI interface. Not intended for clinical diagnosis or medical advice.

externalReferences.comment: Anthropic Transparency Hub — model reports and safety evaluations

components.name: Claude Opus 4.6
components.description: LLM used by Biotrackr Reporting API via Copilot SDK sidecar for AI-generated health reports. Handles complex multi-step reasoning for report generation, code validation review, and data synthesis.

approach.description: Pretrained on large diverse datasets with reinforcement learning from AI feedback (RLAIF) and Constitutional AI character trait training

technicalLimitations: 1M token context window. 128k max output tokens. API rate limits apply. Provider-managed versioning.
ethicalConsiderations: Processes personal health data (PHI) for report generation. Reports undergo independent reviewer agent validation (ASI09). Code validation gate prevents dangerous pattern execution (ASI05).

externalReferences.comment: Anthropic Transparency Hub — Opus 4.6 model report

components.name: GitHub Copilot CLI Sidecar
components.description: Go binary sidecar deployed alongside Biotrackr Reporting API in Azure Container Apps. Provides code generation capabilities for AI-generated health reports via the Copilot SDK.

properties.name: sbom-note
properties.value: Go binary — dependencies unknown without Go SBOM from vendor.

externalReferences.comment: GitHub Copilot SDK — sidecar binary source

services.name: Anthropic Messages API
services.description: External API endpoint for Claude LLM inference. Called by Chat API for conversational health queries. Crosses external trust boundary — health data (PHI) is sent in prompts.

data.name: health-data-queries
data.description: User health queries containing activity, sleep, food, and vitals data sent as prompt context. AI analysis responses returned.

services.name: Copilot SDK Sidecar Service
services.description: Sidecar container running alongside Reporting API in Azure Container Apps. Provides code generation for health report creation. Communicates with GitHub/Microsoft Copilot infrastructure.

data.name: report-generation-data
data.description: Health report content (activity summaries, sleep patterns, nutrition data, weight trends) sent for code generation. Generated report artifacts returned.

services.name: Biotrackr MCP Server
services.description: Model Context Protocol server providing 12 read-only health data query tools across 4 domains (activity, food, sleep, vitals). HTTP Stateless transport with API key authentication.

data.name: health-data-responses
data.description: Activity, food, sleep, and vitals records from Cosmos DB returned to consuming agents via MCP tools.

properties.name: mcp-tools
properties.value: get_activity_by_date, get_activity_by_date_range, get_activity_records, get_food_by_date, get_food_by_date_range, get_food_records, get_sleep_by_date, get_sleep_by_date_range, get_sleep_records, get_weight_by_date, get_weight_by_date_range, get_weight_records
